mapper.insert: INSERT INTO approvals (status, version, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{status, javaType=com.lims.lims_study.domain.approval.model.ApprovalStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT a.id, a.status, a.version, a.created_at, a.updated_at FROM approvals a JOIN approval_signs s ON a.id = s.approval_id WHERE s.target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY a.id DESC

SELECT id, status, version, created_at, updated_at FROM approvals WHERE status = #{status, javaType=com.lims.lims_study.domain.approval.model.ApprovalStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, status, version, created_at, updated_at FROM approvals WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM approvals WHERE status = 'PENDING'
